nodes.title: Parallax
nodes.snippet: Fascinating little book that is of sir Robert Ball's. / Parallax. I never exactly understood. There's a priest. Could ask him. Par it's Greek: parallel, parallax. / He faced about and, standing between the awnings, held out his right hand at arm's length towards the sun. Wanted to try that often. Yes: completely. The tip of his little finger blotted out the sun's disk. Must be the focus where the rays cross. If I had black glasses.
